◎译　　名　拯救濒危语言
◎片　　名　The Linguists
◎年　　代　2008

◎简　　介  

　　THE LINGUISTS follows David Harrison and Gregory Anderson, scientists racing to document languages on the verge of extinction. David and Greg’s round-the-world journey takes them deep into the heart of the cultures, knowledge, and communities at stake.In Siberia, David and Greg seek to record the Chulym language, which hasn’t been heard by outsiders for more than thirty years....
